description: LeadBring is a Chrome extension for LinkedIn automation that handles profile visits, connection requests, and messaging through a centralized prospect dashboard.
overview: LeadBring is a LinkedIn automation tool delivered as a Chrome extension that automates profile visits, connection requests, and follow-up messages while logging all interactions in a single dashboard. Sales professionals, recruiters, and marketers use it to reduce the time spent on repetitive LinkedIn tasks and keep prospect data organized in one place.
what_is: LeadBring is a LinkedIn automation tool that simplifies prospecting and outreach by handling repetitive tasks on your behalf. It visits profiles, sends connection requests, and delivers messages automatically, with all activity tracked through a clean dashboard that stores interaction history and prospect details for easy reference.

The tool is a practical fit for salespeople, recruiters, and marketers who want to cut down on manual LinkedIn work. A free tier that includes up to 25 automated actions lets new users get started immediately after signing up, with results apparent from the first session. The straightforward setup means there is no complex configuration before value is delivered.

LeadBring installs as a Chrome extension and complements a broader sales stack by handling LinkedIn-specific lead management and outreach. It is not a full CRM or email marketing platform; its focus is entirely on automating the LinkedIn workflow steps that consume the most time in a typical prospecting routine.
